M-075.NAME: premium-user-cabinet
M-075.path: frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/pages/Subscription.tsx frontend/src/pages/Referrals.tsx frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx docs/plans/Phase-57.xml docs/plans/Phase-62.xml scripts/phase57-premium-user-cabinet-smoke.mjs scripts/phase62-compactness-deletion-smoke.mjs
M-075.owns: Premium compact personal cabinet for VPN, MTProto, subscription, devices, referrals, and settings.
M-075.purpose: Turn the user cabinet into a compact premium command center without hiding core actions.

exports.view-premium-user-home: First-screen VPN state, config action, subscription countdown, and MTProto access.
exports.view-premium-config: QR, download, copy, and raw config workflow with compact premium controls.
exports.view-premium-subscription: Tariff, countdown, calendar, and renewal flow with server-derived data.
exports.rule-user-deletion-audit: Remove duplicated, bulky, decorative, or non-actionable user-cabinet content.

constraints.constraint-1: VPN config and subscription actions must remain reachable within one or two taps on phone.
constraints.constraint-2: Owner-only MTProto secrets and links must remain redacted from logs and unavailable to other users.
constraints.constraint-3: No backend API, deploy, install, billing, VPN, or MTProto runtime behavior changes are included.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Frontend build and premium user smoke passed on 2026-06-03.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Static route proof and CSS guards cover compact first screen, no legacy route redirects, and no horizontal scroll primitives; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Deletion audit remains Phase-62 scope; Phase-57 only collapsed and compacted protected user surfaces while preserving primary workflows.

M-075.evidence: 2026-06-03: Phase-57 added protected user command center, /dashboard/* primary actions, compact config/subscription/referral/settings surfaces, Phase-57 smoke, frontend build, Phase-45/46/48/50/52/53/55/56 regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.
M-075.hotspot: H-062: Premium user cabinet must keep VPN config, subscription, MTProto, and device actions reachable in one or two taps.
